_doc: Declares which capabilities the LOCAL DummyJSON target (the system under test) actually supports. The guardrail layer uses this to classify an agent's low score as ENV-LIMITED (the probed feature is absent on the target) versus a real FAIL or an EMPTY agent output. This file is AGENT-SIDE: it never modifies the DummyJSON app; it only tells the harness how to interpret results so absent-feature 0%s stop masquerading as bugs or as agent failures.

correlation_id_echo.reason: Clone does not echo X-Correlation-ID in responses.

downstream_services.reason: No downstream/microservice tracing exists behind the clone.

api_request_logging.reason: Log-presence assertions require LOG_ENABLED=true at node boot; run launched LOG_ENABLED=false.

audit_log.reason: No audit-log subsystem in the clone.

rate_limiting.reason: express-rate-limit only active when booted NODE_ENV=production; run booted development.

retry_after_header.reason: Retry-After only emitted by the limiter under NODE_ENV=production.

api_versioning.reason: Clone exposes a single unversioned API surface.

caching_headers.reason: Clone does not emit ETag/Cache-Control compliance headers.

tls_enforcement.reason: Local target served over http on localhost; no TLS termination.

graphql.reason: DummyJSON exposes REST only; no GraphQL endpoint.

soft_delete.reason: DummyJSON returns the object with isDeleted=true/deletedOn (simulated soft delete).

crud.reason: Create/read/update/delete are simulated and return representative bodies.

access_control.reason: No role/permission gating: GET /products returns 200 without a token; only /auth/me is token-gated. The clone has authentication but no AUTHORIZATION layer to probe.

enum_validation.reason: No enum/allowed-value enforcement: POST /products/add with category='__notarealcategory__' returns 201 (accepted). The clone does not reject out-of-enum field values.

response_schema_docs.reason: data/openapi.json documents 0/22 response schemas, so there is nothing for schema-conformance validation to assert against (responses_validated=0, rate=None).

_thresholds_doc: metric >= pass_threshold_pct => PASS; >= partial_threshold_pct => PARTIAL; below => FAIL — UNLESS the agent maps to an unsupported capability, in which case ENV-LIMITED (excluded from real-fail accounting).
